paper.title_en: Regular black holes with Minkowskian cores: causal structure and observational degeneracy
paper.abstract_en: We construct a new family of asymptotically flat static and rotating regular black holes characterized by a Minkowskian core and a finite two-horizon structure. The solutions are obtained within the framework of gravitational decoupling and provide an analytically tractable realization of non-singular black hole geometries with a regular interior and well-defined asymptotic properties. We investigate the optical appearance of the rotating spacetime through shadow observables and ray-traced images of geometrically thin, optically thin accretion disks. Despite the substantial differences between the interior geometry of these solutions and that of singular black holes, their optical signatures are found to remain remarkably close to those of Schwarzschild and Kerr spacetimes with the same asymptotic parameters. Our results show that markedly different black hole interiors may lead to nearly indistinguishable optical appearances, highlighting the challenges of probing the internal structure of compact objects using current shadow and imaging observations.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文构建了一类具有闵可夫斯基核的新正则黑洞解，并系统分析了其因果结构与光学外观，揭示了黑洞内部几何与观测不可区分性，对黑洞物理研究具有理论意义。
decision.title_zh: 具有闵可夫斯基核的正则黑洞：因果结构与观测简并
decision.abstract_zh: 我们构造了一个新的渐近平直静态和旋转正则黑洞族，其特征是闵可夫斯基核和有限的双视界结构。这些解是在引力退耦框架内获得的，提供了一种具有规则内部和良好渐近性质的非奇异黑洞几何的解析可处理实现。我们通过阴影可观测量和几何薄、光学薄吸积盘的射线追踪图像研究了旋转时空的光学外观。尽管这些解的内部几何与奇异黑洞存在显著差异，但其光学特征被发现仍然与具有相同渐近参数的史瓦西和克尔时空 remarkably close。我们的结果表明，显著不同的黑洞内部可能导致几乎无法区分的视觉外观，这突显了利用当前阴影和成像观测探测致密天体内部结构的挑战。
